vision: The Time Traveler's Majlis - A bridge between the tactile warmth of the past and the crystalline clarity of the future.

traditional.name: Al-Turath (Heritage)
traditional.visuals: Paper textures, serif fonts, skeuomorphic patterns, warm lighting.

modern.name: Al-Mustaqbal (Future)
modern.visuals: Glassmorphism, clean lines, floating elements, dark mode default.

buttons.senior_accessible: h-16 text-xl rounded-xl shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.modern_sleek: h-12 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full

cards.modern: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

components.sadu_pattern: Use a repeating SVG pattern of diamonds and triangles. In Heritage mode, opacity 100%. In Modern mode, opacity 5% as a texture overlay.

general.focus_states: Visible thick outline (Orange in Heritage, Cyan in Modern)
general.screen_reader: All images must have cultural context in alt text

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: You MUST implement the 'Dual Interface' using a React Context (ThemeContext) that wraps the entire app.
The ThemeContext must expose: theme ('heritage' | 'modern'), toggleTheme(), and specific derived values like 'primaryColor'.
For the 'Sadu Pattern', create a CSS-in-JS or SVG component that draws a geometric strip (Triangle-Diamond-Triangle) to use as borders/dividers.
For the 'Senior Gateway', force the layout to be simpler: 1 column, huge cards, clear icons.
For 'Kids World', switch to a 'Gamified' sub-theme: brighter colors, rounded-3xl corners, bouncy animations.
Ensure RTL is handled correctly using 'dir=rtl' on the root and logical CSS properties (ms-, me- instead of ml-, mr-).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds in Heritage mode. Use solid warm colors + noise texture.
In Modern mode, use 'backdrop-filter: blur(12px)' for all overlays.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'Middle Eastern' tropes. No camels unless specifically relevant.
Never center text in long paragraphs. Always justify or align-start.
